title: Responsive Sidebar Overlay

statement.markdown:
## Responsive Sidebar Overlay

Create a layout with a left sidebar navigation drawer and a main workspace.

### Requirements:
1. **Responsive Drawer**: On viewports (<1024px), sidebar slides completely offscreen, toggled via menu click overlays. Desktop layout displays sidebar docked on the left.
2. **Backdrop overlay**: Display a dark semi-transparent backdrop overlay when mobile drawer is open. Clicking the overlay close triggers the drawer offscreen.
3. **CSS transforms**: Implement transitions showing active states smoothly.

constraints: Must implement sidebar animations with CSS classes transition
Z-index layering must place overlay backdrop correctly above workspace contents

starterCode.html:

gradingCriteria.description: Verify sidebar displays docked on desktop and transitions offscreen on mobile.
Verify backdrop opens/closes cleanly alongside sidebar triggers.
